title: Polish-Style Pork and Dumplings
description: A hearty and comforting Polish-inspired dish featuring tender pork and soft dumplings.

ingredients.name: Dumpling dough
ingredients.amount: 1 package (usually found in the refrigerated section)

instructions: Season the pork cubes with salt and black pepper.
In a large skillet, cook the pork over medium-high heat until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the pork to a baking dish and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced Polish sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Roll out the dumpling dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Cut the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Dust the dumplings with soft flour, then flatten each into a disk shape.
Place the dumplings on top of the pork in the baking dish.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the dumplings are golden brown.
